'''鈭歵h-s-v-l''' ('''kathasveloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jib|jib]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jib|jib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-v-l
|-
! Lemma
| kathasveloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithasveloko|thithasveloko]] || [[word:jithasveloko|jithasveloko]] || [[word:shithasveloko|shithasveloko]] || [[word:kithasveloko|kithasveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthasveloko|thuthuthasveloko]] || [[word:jujuthasveloko|jujuthasveloko]] || [[word:shushuthasveloko|shushuthasveloko]] || [[word:kukuthasveloko|kukuthasveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthasveloko|thuthasveloko]] || [[word:juthasveloko|juthasveloko]] || [[word:shuthasveloko|shuthasveloko]] || [[word:kuthasveloko|kuthasveloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthasveloko|thuthasveloko]] || [[word:juthasveloko|juthasveloko]] || [[word:shuthasveloko|shuthasveloko]] || [[word:kuthasveloko|kuthasveloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothasveloko|thothothasveloko]] || [[word:jojothasveloko|jojothasveloko]] || [[word:shoshothasveloko|shoshothasveloko]] || [[word:kokothasveloko|kokothasveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothasveloko|thothasveloko]] || [[word:jothasveloko|jothasveloko]] || [[word:shothasveloko|shothasveloko]] || [[word:kothasveloko|kothasveloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothasveloko|thothasveloko]] || [[word:jothasveloko|jothasveloko]] || [[word:shothasveloko|shothasveloko]] || [[word:kothasveloko|kothasveloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thasveloko|th忙thasveloko]] || [[word:j忙thasveloko|j忙thasveloko]] || [[word:sh忙thasveloko|sh忙thasveloko]] || [[word:k忙thasveloko|k忙thasveloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathasveloko|thathasveloko]] || [[word:jathasveloko|jathasveloko]] || [[word:shathasveloko|shathasveloko]] || [[word:kathasveloko|kathasveloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
